name: portfolios
description: List all portfolios accessible via Kubera API. Use this to see available portfolios and their IDs. For getting detailed portfolio data, use summary or json instead.

portfolio.description: Specific portfolio ID to query (optional; auto-selects for single-portfolio accounts)

name: summary
description: Get net worth summary including allocation breakdown and top holdings. Use this for a quick overview of financial status. For detailed asset-level data, use assets or json. For portfolio listing only, use portfolios.

portfolio.description: Specific portfolio ID to query (optional; auto-selects for single-portfolio accounts)

name: json
description: Get full portfolio data as raw JSON from Kubera API. Use this for complete programmatic access to all portfolio data including assets, debts, insurance, documents, and detailed fields. For a human-readable summary, use summary instead.

portfolio.description: Specific portfolio ID to query (optional; auto-selects for single-portfolio accounts)

name: assets
description: List all assets in portfolio, optionally filtered by sheet (category) and sorted. Use this to view holdings by asset class (Crypto, Equities, Retirement, etc.). For searching by name/ticker, use search instead. For net worth summary, use summary.

portfolio.description: Specific portfolio ID to query (optional; auto-selects for single-portfolio accounts)

sheet.description: Filter by sheet name (e.g., Crypto, Equities, Retirement, Real Estate, Cash)

sort.description: Sort order: value (highest first), name (alphabetical), gain (highest gain first)

name: search
description: Search assets and debts by name, ticker, or account name. Use this to quickly find specific holdings. For viewing all assets filtered by category, use assets instead.

query.description: Search query (matches against asset name, ticker, or section name)

portfolio.description: Specific portfolio ID to query (optional; auto-selects for single-portfolio accounts)

name: update_asset
description: Update an existing asset or debt in the portfolio. Requires write permission API key and --confirm flag to execute. Common use cases: update current value of an asset, rename an account, update cost basis. For viewing assets without making changes, use assets or search.

item_id.description: The asset or debt ID to update (get this from assets or search commands)

confirm.description: Required flag to actually execute the write operation (will show preview without this flag)

portfolio.description: Specific portfolio ID (optional; auto-selects for single-portfolio accounts)
